name: Warehouse wise Consumable Consumption
query: SELECT sed.item_code AS "Item Code", sed.item_name AS "Item Name", i.item_group AS "Item Group", sed.t_warehouse AS "Department", SUM(sed.qty) AS "Qty", SUM(sed.basic_amount) AS "Cost" FROM `tabStock Entry Detail` sed LEFT JOIN `tabItem` i ON i.name = sed.item_code LEFT JOIN `tabItem Group` ig ON ig.name = i.item_group LEFT JOIN `tabStock Entry` se ON se.name = sed.parent WHERE ig.parent_item_group = 'Consumable' AND se.docstatus = 1 AND (%(item_group)s IS NULL OR %(item_group)s = '' OR i.item_group = %(item_group)s) GROUP BY sed.item_code, sed.t_warehouse ORDER BY sed.t_warehouse, sed.item_code
